script_text: Prefixes and suffixes show up in lots of words.
Knowing the common ones makes reading easier.
UN is not. RE is again. PRE is before. DIS is the opposite.
ER means one who does. ING means happening now.
FUL means full of. LESS means without.
Make flashcards of common prefixes and suffixes. Quiz yourself!
Now you are ready to use prefixes and suffixes!
